item.title: GB Whatsapp APK 17.70 Download For Android Free [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: GB Whatsapp APK 17.70 Download For Android Free [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: yhgygy8t
item.itunes:summary:
GB Whatsapp APK 17.70 Download For Android Free
(Various Games)
GB WhatsApp is a customized version of the popular WhatsApp application, developed by third parties and not officially supported by WhatsApp. This version offers a range of extended features and customizations compared to the original app, making it a popular choice for users who want more flexibility and control over their WhatsApp experience.
The GB WhatsApp APK 17.70 version is the latest release of this application, bringing many improvements and new features. Here are some specific details about GB WhatsApp APK 17.70:

item.title: USB Disk Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Disk Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
USB Disk Undelete
(Utilities)
Memory stick information retrieval utility rescue lost files folders and extract pictures digital images from formatted disk drive. Software undelete digital file recover lost directory, data base records backup missed audio video songs and other information from removal storage device such as thumb drive or pen drive. Utility support various major pen drives manufacturer including Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Jet flash, super flash, SanDisk, Transcend, Toshiba, Panasonic in all capacities like 64mb 128mb 256mb 512mb 1GB 2GB 4GB 8GB and higher drives. Tool relocates logically corrupted or virus infected drive data using Windows 11, 10, 8 and get back records lost due to improper shutdown, power failure, human error hardware malfunction, and other type of system failure. Software provides recovery capabilities for searching any type of digital files stored in your jetflash, jump drive, key chain drive, zip drive, disk-on-key drive. Application program recover virus corrupted collections and fetches deleted Microsoft office documents. It recovers data even if “drive not formatted” message is displayed by computer while accessing USB storage device. Software features: * Effective solution for recovery from accidentally formatted removable media or deleted files and folders. * Data retrieval tool support different Microsoft Windows operating system. * Retrieve corrupted digital files and folders (doc, xls, jpeg, jpg, ppt, mp3 etc) lost due to human error or any virus generated data loss. * Non destructive utility does not require any technical knowledge to operate it. * Freeware demo version with help option.

[read more]
item.description:
USB Disk Undelete
(Utilities)
Memory stick information retrieval utility rescue lost files folders and extract pictures digital images from formatted disk drive. Software undelete digital file recover lost directory, data base records backup missed audio video songs and other information from removal storage device such as thumb drive or pen drive. Utility support various major pen drives manufacturer including Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Jet flash, super flash, SanDisk, Transcend, Toshiba, Panasonic in all capacities like 64mb 128mb 256mb 512mb 1GB 2GB 4GB 8GB and higher drives. Tool relocates logically corrupted or virus infected drive data using Windows 11, 10, 8 and get back records lost due to improper shutdown, power failure, human error hardware malfunction, and other type of system failure. Software provides recovery capabilities for searching any type of digital files stored in your jetflash, jump drive, key chain drive, zip drive, disk-on-key drive. Application program recover virus corrupted collections and fetches deleted Microsoft office documents. It recovers data even if “drive not formatted” message is displayed by computer while accessing USB storage device. Software features: * Effective solution for recovery from accidentally formatted removable media or deleted files and folders. * Data retrieval tool support different Microsoft Windows operating system. * Retrieve corrupted digital files and folders (doc, xls, jpeg, jpg, ppt, mp3 etc) lost due to human error or any virus generated data loss. * Non destructive utility does not require any technical knowledge to operate it. * Freeware demo version with help option.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
USB Disk Undelete
(Utilities)
Memory stick information retrieval utility rescue lost files folders and extract pictures digital images from formatted disk drive. Software undelete digital file recover lost directory, data base records backup missed audio video songs and other information from removal storage device such as thumb drive or pen drive. Utility support various major pen drives manufacturer including Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Jet flash, super flash, SanDisk, Transcend, Toshiba, Panasonic in all capacities like 64mb 128mb 256mb 512mb 1GB 2GB 4GB 8GB and higher drives. Tool relocates logically corrupted or virus infected drive data using Windows 11, 10, 8 and get back records lost due to improper shutdown, power failure, human error hardware malfunction, and other type of system failure. Software provides recovery capabilities for searching any type of digital files stored in your jetflash, jump drive, key chain drive, zip drive, disk-on-key drive. Application program recover virus corrupted collections and fetches deleted Microsoft office documents. It recovers data even if “drive not formatted” message is displayed by computer while accessing USB storage device. Software features: * Effective solution for recovery from accidentally formatted removable media or deleted files and folders. * Data retrieval tool support different Microsoft Windows operating system. * Retrieve corrupted digital files and folders (doc, xls, jpeg, jpg, ppt, mp3 etc) lost due to human error or any virus generated data loss. * Non destructive utility does not require any technical knowledge to operate it. * Freeware demo version with help option.

item.title: GTA 5 Latest Version Download For Android [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: GTA 5 Latest Version Download For Android [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: yhgygy8t
item.itunes:summary:
GTA 5 Latest Version Download For Android
(Various Games)
GTA 5 plunges players into the expansive world of Los Santos, a virtual city inspired by Los Angeles and its surrounding areas. The story revolves around three main characters:
Michael De Santa: An aging bank robber who has left behind a life of crime to live a cozy retirement, yet he still feels empty and bored.
Franklin Clinton: A young taxi driver seeking opportunities to escape street life and climb the ranks in the criminal world.
Trevor Philips: A deranged criminal who enjoys killing and drug trafficking, he's Michael's childhood friend and one of the most dangerous robbers in Los Santos.
These three characters collaborate on missions to carry out bank heists, car thefts, and other criminal activities.

Gameplay:
GTA 5 offers a vast, diverse, and lively open world. Players can freely roam the city and its surrounding areas, undertake the main story missions, or engage in various side activities such as golfing, racing, or participating in large-scale online battles.
[read more]

GTA 5 Latest Version Download For Android

GTA 5 plunges players into the expansive world of Los Santos, a virtual city inspired by Los Angeles and its surrounding areas. The story revolves around three main characters:

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

eric

Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".

item.title: USB Sim Card Manager [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Sim Card Manager [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
USB Sim Card Manager
(Utilities)
SIM card forensic software analyze formatted corrupted mobile phone sim card and recover inbox, outbox, sent items text SMS lost due to accidentally corruption or virus infection on SIM card. USB Simcard reader device tool detects Sim card through Phoenix Standard or PC/SC Standard based USB card reader and rescue contact number with name, call history, ICC-ID number, IMSI number with service provider name from all GSM 3G supported sim card.

[read more]

[read more]

USB Simcard reader device tool detects Sim card through Phoenix Standard or PC/SC Standard based USB card reader and rescue contact number with name, call history, ICC-ID number, IMSI number with service provider name from all GSM 3G supported sim card.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Company presents Digital Camera Data Recovery Software on developer’s website www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com at a lost price specialized to successfully restore deleted photographs, snapshots, multimedia audio, video playlists, clips from accidently formatted digital camera memory card drive within just fraction of seconds. Retrieval application supports all types of images, video formats like jpeg, gif, wmf etc for proper salvage of files and folders.

[read more]

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
